summary: Lead accepts the reviewed M7 strategic terrain recovery planning package for PR integration only. The package records the product-owner root-level rejection of the current map drawing and spatial indexing direction, accepts ADR-011 as the replacement planning direction, and keeps the downstream strategic terrain tasks DRAFT until separately started.

tests_run.result: No output; downstream tasks remain DRAFT until recovery integration closes.
No whitespace errors before lead acceptance.

decisions.decision: Accept M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RECOVERY-001 planning package for PR integration. This acceptance does not approve M7 content lock and does not start downstream implementation.
The rejected current map drawing and spatial indexing direction must be replaced by the ADR-011 terrain-route-node player-facing authority chain before content-lock reconsideration can reopen.
M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-SCHEMA-001, FIXTURE-001, RENDERER-INTERACTION-001, and VALIDATION-001 remain DRAFT and will become eligible only after this planning task is integrated and closed.
M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains blocked with content_lock_accepted=false; M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 must not start.

risks.summary: The accepted plan requires replacing the player-facing strategic terrain drawing and spatial query model across later schema/content/client/validation tasks.
risks.mitigation: Keep downstream tasks sequential, reviewed, and separately integrated.

requested_action: Open PR for the accepted planning package. After PR CI and merge, close M7-STRATEGIC-TERRAIN-RECOVERY-001 and start the next READY task.
